summary: Comprehensive testing of VÁHY DYCHL B2B e-commerce website completed. All core functionality working including contact form submission, API integration, and UI sections.

ui_bugs.issue: Some navigation links have overlay interception preventing clicks in automation
ui_bugs.note: Functionality works but automation clicks get intercepted by overlay elements

passed_tests: API root endpoint (GET /api/) - 200 status
Contact form submission (POST /api/contact) - 200 status, saves to MongoDB
Contact form validation - 422 for missing required fields
Get contacts endpoint (GET /api/contacts) - retrieves saved data
Invalid endpoint handling - 404 status
Navbar renders with logo, navigation links, phone number, CTA button
Produkty dropdown menu opens showing all 5 categories
Hero section with headline, sub-headline, CTA buttons, trust indicators
Categories bento grid with 5 product categories and images
Bestsellers section with 3 product cards, titles, specs, CTAs
Service section with split layout, service points, contact card
Contact form with all fields (name, email, phone, company, message)
Contact form end-to-end integration working perfectly
Footer with company info, product links, service links, contact details
All required data-testid attributes present
Success toast notification after form submission
Form clearing after successful submission
Czech language content throughout
Industrial color scheme (Dark Navy, Steel Gray, Orange accent)
Professional B2B design implementation
